details.test: Task 1: Cheapest highly rated standard cleaning for 2BR next Wednesday afternoon
Task 2: Select bi-weekly plan under $150 and schedule start date
Task 3: Move-out deep cleaning instant quote under budget with add-on adjustment
Task 4: Weekend pre-1pm pet-friendly cleaning for studio

Task 7: Submit support request about adding laundry folding to bi-weekly plan
Task 8: Under-$200 package including inside-oven cleaning for 2-bedroom
Task 9: Create account, favorite services, add address, and log out
